body:
Dealing with a garage door that won't budge is an absolute headache, especially when you need to get somewhere today. Fortunately, Dublin has several highly rated, local companies that offer **same-day and emergency garage door repairs**. [Garage Door Repair Services in Dublin, CA](https://www.rwgaragedoors.com/dublin/garage-door-repair/#:~:text=We%20offer%20full%20stack%20garage,highest%20quality%20parts%20and%20workmanship.)

Here are the top local options to call right now to get someone out to your house today:

### 1\. Boulevard Garage Doors

  * **Location:** Right in Dublin / Pleasant Hill [Licensed Garage Door Repairs | CSLB #1101133 | Call us now (925)-272-7900; (510)-984-7200](https://www.blvdgaragedoors.com/#:~:text=Licensed%20Garage%20Door%20Repairs%20%7C%20CSLB,Dublin%2C%20CA%20and%20Pleasant%20Hill)

  * **Phone:** (925) 272-7900 [Licensed Garage Door Repairs | CSLB #1101133 | Call us now (925)-272-7900; (510)-984-7200](https://www.blvdgaragedoors.com/#:~:text=Licensed%20Garage%20Door%20Repairs%20%7C%20CSLB,Dublin%2C%20CA%20and%20Pleasant%20Hill)

  * **Why call them:** They are a highly-rated family-owned local business known for exceptionally fast response times. Past Dublin clients note they frequently arrive within two hours to handle snapped springs or doors that won't open. [Licensed Garage Door Repairs | CSLB #1101133 | Call us now (925)-272-7900; (510)-984-7200](https://www.blvdgaragedoors.com/#:~:text=Super%20fast%20response%20time%20too,garage%2C%20he%20was%20like%20godsend.)

### 2\. Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation

  * **Location:** Dublin based (Aviano Way) [Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation - Birdeye](https://birdeye.com/aces-garage-door-repair-installation-152298851555016#:~:text=We're%20open%20for%20installations,Location%20details)

  * **Phone:** Open 24/7 for customer service support. [Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation - Birdeye](https://birdeye.com/aces-garage-door-repair-installation-152298851555016)

  * **Why call them:** Boasting over 1,000 near-perfect local reviews, they are deeply trusted in the Dublin/San Ramon area. They keep almost all standard residential parts fully stocked in their trucks to guarantee a same-day fix. [Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation - Birdeye](https://birdeye.com/aces-garage-door-repair-installation-152298851555016#:~:text=We're%20open%20for%20installations,Location%20details)

### 3\. Precision Garage Door of East Bay

  * **Pleasanton/Dublin Line Phone:** (925) 271-7818 [Garage Door Repair Reviews in Dublin, CA (Updated June 2026)](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/dublin)

  * **Why call them:** They are a massive local favorite for emergencies because they answer calls 24/7 with a live operator and offer dedicated same-day booking blocks. [Garage Door Repair Reviews in Dublin, CA (Updated June 2026)](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/reviews/city/dublin#:~:text=Garage%20Door%20Repair%20Reviews%20in,Fri)

### 4\. Right Way Garage Doors

  * **Service Area:** Dublin and surrounding Tri-Valley

  * **Why call them:** Their "Service Pro" vans are rolling warehouses. They specialize in diagnosing why a door won't open (usually a broken torsion spring or a safety sensor misalignment) and aim to complete the repair on the spot on the first visit.

### 💡 Quick Safety Check Before They Arrive:

  * **Don't pull the red emergency release cord if the door is partially open.** If a spring is broken, the heavy door could crash down rapidly.

  * **Look at the big spring above the door.** If you see a visible 2-inch gap or split in the coil, **do not** try to use your automated opener again. Trying to force it can burn out your motor or strip the gears.

Is your car trapped inside right now, or are you just trying to get the door secured? Let me know if you need help troubleshooting the safety sensors while you wait for a tech!
